additional_headers_for_the_edge_function: Additional headers for the Edge Function request
array_of_schema_names_found_in_the_datab: Array of schema names found in the database
array_of_table_schemas_for_introspect_op: Array of table schemas for introspect operation
cache_control_max_age_in_seconds_for_upl: Cache-Control max-age in seconds for upload
call_a_deployed_supabase_edge_function_o: Call a deployed Supabase Edge Function over HTTP and use its JSON response.
count_type_exact_planned_or_estimated: Count type: exact, planned, or estimated
database_records_storage_objects_or_oper: Database records, storage objects, or operation results depending on the operation type
describe_how_to_sort_e_g_newest_first: Describe how to sort (e.g., "newest first by created_at")...
describe_the_filter_condition_you_need: Describe the filter condition you need...
downloaded_file_stored_in_execution_file: Downloaded file stored in execution files
expiration_time_in_seconds_for_signed_ur: Expiration time in seconds for signed URL
file_name_for_upload_or_download_overrid: File name for upload or download override
file_or_folder_path_in_storage: File or folder path in storage
function_name_postgresql_function_for_rp: Function name — PostgreSQL function for RPC or vector search, or Edge Function name to invoke
http_method_for_the_edge_function_reques: HTTP method for the Edge Function request
insert_a_new_supabase_row_or_update_it: Insert a new Supabase row or update it if it already exists in one idempotent call.
integrate_supabase_into_the_workflow_sup: Integrate Supabase into the workflow. Supports database operations (query, insert, update, delete, upsert), full-text search, RPC functions, Edge Function invocation, row counting, vector search, and complete storage management (upload, download, list, move, copy, delete files and buckets).
maximum_number_of_similar_results_to_ret: Maximum number of similar results to return
parameters_to_pass_to_rpc_function: Parameters to pass to RPC function
public_leave_empty_for_all_user_schemas: public (leave empty for all user schemas)
read_rows_from_a_supabase_table_with_pos: Read rows from a Supabase table with PostgREST filters, ordering, and pagination.
request_body_to_send_to_the_edge_functio: Request body to send to the Edge Function
run_pgvector_similarity_search_against_a: Run pgvector similarity search against a Supabase table to retrieve the closest embeddings.
search_type_plain_phrase_or_websearch: Search type: plain, phrase, or websearch
success_or_error_message_describing_the_: Success or error message describing the operation outcome
temporary_signed_url_for_storage_file: Temporary signed URL for storage file
upload_a_file_to_a_supabase_storage_buck: Upload a file to a Supabase Storage bucket and return a public or signed URL.
your_supabase_service_role_secret_key: Your Supabase service role secret key
